parameters.query:
INSERT INTO properties (
  listing_id, title, price, price_currency, bedrooms, bathrooms,
  property_type, suburb, city, province, size_sqm, url, source,
  description, agent_name, agent_phone, images, features,
  latitude, longitude, scraped_at, status
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.listing_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.price }},
  '{{ $json.price_currency }}',
  {{ $json.bedrooms }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms }},
  '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  '{{ $json.suburb }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}',
  '{{ $json.province }}',
  {{ $json.size_sqm }},
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.agent_name }}',
  '{{ $json.agent_phone }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.images) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.features) }}',
  {{ $json.latitude || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.longitude || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.received_at }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (listing_id) DO UPDATE SET
  price = EXCLUDED.price,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  scraped_at = EXCLUDED.scraped_at,
  description = EXCLUDED.description
RETURNING id, listing_id, title, price, created_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $json.id, listing_id: $json.listing_id, message: 'Listing received and stored successfully' }) }}
